reason: Audit (b) 2026-06-12: the diary line on A_0235_L reads 'we stopped at DALE to buy knitwear' (Dale, the Norwegian knitwear town on the Bergen–Voss road), not 'Oslo' — the only 'Oslo' on that page is the printed caption 'Christiania is the old name for Oslo'. The item was correctly excluded from the canonical route; recording the corrected reading here.
